code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut p = 0
mut n = 0
mut i = 0
let len = string.len(line)
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false

while i < len
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if in_num
      let val = sign * cur
      if val > 0
        p = p + val
      else if val < 0
        n = n + val
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let val = sign * cur
  if val > 0
    p = p + val
  else if val < 0
    n = n + val
  end
end

let r = p - n
println("r=#{r}")
